mobchampions.configuration.allowelytradr: Set to false to prevent champions from dropping elytra.
mobchampions.configuration.armorlist.des:
Format: <rarity>-<weight>-<modid:item_name>
Rarity: 1 (Uncommon), 2 (Rare), 3 (Epic), 4 (Legendary)
Weight: Integer value representing the relative chance of selection
Example: 3-30-minecraft:diamond_chestplate
mobchampions.configuration.championwhite:
Whitelist of entities that can spawn as champions.
If the whitelist is empty, the mod is effectively disabled.
mobchampions.configuration.color.descrip: Colors used for champions based on their rank.
mobchampions.configuration.color.name: Champion Colors
mobchampions.configuration.colors.descri: Colors to use in fireworks. Requires hex formatted colors.
mobchampions.configuration.colors.name: Legendary Fireworks Colors
mobchampions.configuration.commonmobweig: Relative weight for a normal or common mob to spawn.
mobchampions.configuration.creeperexplos:
Multiplier applied to the explosion radius of creeper champions by rank.
For example, a value of 0.25 will double the explosion radius of a legendary (rank 4) creeper.
mobchampions.configuration.disablebabych: If true, baby variants of entities will not spawn as champions.
mobchampions.configuration.effects.descr: Settings that modify the effects applied to champions based on their rank.
mobchampions.configuration.effects.name: Effects Settings
mobchampions.configuration.enablespawnme: If true, a message will be broadcast to players in the configurable range when a champion spawns.
mobchampions.configuration.epicdifficult: Difficulty settings level applied to epic champions. Higher means stronger champions.
mobchampions.configuration.epicexperienc: Experience multiplier applied to epic champions.
mobchampions.configuration.epiclootablea: Chance for epic champions to spawn with upgraded loot table armor.
mobchampions.configuration.epiclootablew: Chance for epic champions to spawn with lootable weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.epicstandarda: Chance for epic champions to spawn with standard armor.
mobchampions.configuration.epicstandardw: Chance for epic champions to spawn with standard weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.epicweight.de: Relative weight for epic champions to spawn.
mobchampions.configuration.equipment.des: Settings that modify the items equipped by champions based on their rank.
mobchampions.configuration.experience.de: Settings that modify the experience dropped by champions based on their rank.
mobchampions.configuration.fireresistanc:
Chance for the fire resistance effect to be applied to eligible champions.
This is added so players can't cheese kill fire-based damage against champions.
Minimum champion rank required to apply the fire resistance effect.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworkschan: Chance of fireworks after legendary champion defeat. 0 disables fireworks.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworksflic: Fireworks flicker setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworksheig: Height above champion that fireworks explode.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworksmini: Minimum champion rank required to trigger fireworks on death.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworksonde: If true, fireworks will spawn when a champion is killed by player.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworksshap: Fireworks shape setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
mobchampions.configuration.fireworkstrai: Fireworks trail setting as it relates to Minecraft fireworks.
mobchampions.configuration.glowingeffect:
Duration in seconds for the glowing effect applied to champions.
Set to 0 to disable. Set to -1 for infinite duration.
Minimum champion rank required to apply the glowing effect.
mobchampions.configuration.infestedeffec: Chance for the infested effect to be applied to eligible champions.
Minimum champion rank required to apply the infested effect.
mobchampions.configuration.legendarydiff: Difficulty settings level applied to legendary champions. Higher means stronger champions.
mobchampions.configuration.legendaryeffe: Multiplier applied to all effect chances for legendary champions.
mobchampions.configuration.legendaryexpe: Experience multiplier applied to legendary champions.
mobchampions.configuration.legendaryloot: Chance for legendary champions to spawn with upgraded loot table armor.
mobchampions.configuration.legendarystan: Chance for legendary champions to spawn with standard armor.
Chance for legendary champions to spawn with standard weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.legendaryweig: Relative weight for legendary champions to spawn.
mobchampions.configuration.lootdrops.des: Settings that modify the loot dropped by champions.
mobchampions.configuration.mobdeath.desc:
Settings that modify the behavior of mob deaths when killed by champions.
All settings in this section require a restart to take effect.
mobchampions.configuration.mobdeath.name: Mob Death Settings
mobchampions.configuration.raredifficult: Difficulty settings level applied to rare champions. Higher means stronger champions.
mobchampions.configuration.rareexperienc: Experience multiplier applied to rare champions.
mobchampions.configuration.rarelootablea: Chance for rare champions to spawn with upgraded loot table armor.
mobchampions.configuration.rarelootablew: Chance for rare champions to spawn with lootable weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.rarestandarda: Chance for rare champions to spawn with standard armor.
mobchampions.configuration.rarestandardw: Chance for rare champions to spawn with standard weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.rareweight.de: Relative weight for rare champions to spawn.
mobchampions.configuration.spawning.desc:
Relative weights determine the chance of each rank spawning.
Default weights are set so there is a 69% chance for common mobs,
17.2% chance for uncommon champions, 10.3% chance for rare champions,
3.1% chance for epic champions, and 0.7% chance for legendary champions.
mobchampions.configuration.spawning.name: Spawning Settings
mobchampions.configuration.spawnmessagem: Minimum champion rank required to trigger a spawn message.
mobchampions.configuration.spawnmessager: Radius around the champion spawn point to check for players to send the spawn message to.
mobchampions.configuration.spawntypeblac:
Blacklist of spawn reasons that prevent champions from spawning.
Spawn reasons must be one of: [NATURAL, CHUNK_GENERATION, SPAWNER, STRUCTURE, BREEDING, MOB_SUMMONED, JOCKEY, EVENT, CONVERSION, REINFORCEMENT, TRIGGERED, BUCKET, SPAWN_ITEM_USE, COMMAND, DISPENSER, PATROL, TRIAL_SPAWNER, LOAD, DIMENSION_TRAVEL]
mobchampions.configuration.standardarmor: Chance for champions wearing standard armor to drop it on death.
mobchampions.configuration.standardweapo: Chance for champions wielding standard weapons to drop them on death.
mobchampions.configuration.stats.descrip:
Settings that modify the stats and abilities of champions based on their rank.
All settings in this section require a restart to take effect.
Changes do not apply to already spawned champions.
mobchampions.configuration.stats.name: Stats Settings
mobchampions.configuration.title: Mob Champions
mobchampions.configuration.uncommondiffi: Difficulty settings level applied to uncommon champions. Higher means stronger champions.
mobchampions.configuration.uncommonexper: Experience multiplier applied to uncommon champions.
mobchampions.configuration.uncommonloota: Chance for uncommon champions to spawn with upgraded loot table armor.
Chance for uncommon champions to spawn with lootable weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.uncommonstand: Chance for uncommon champions to spawn with standard armor.
Chance for uncommon champions to spawn with standard weapons.
mobchampions.configuration.uncommonweigh: Relative weight for uncommon champions to spawn.
mobchampions.configuration.visuals.descr: All settings related to the rendering of fireworks when a creeper explodes.
mobchampions.configuration.visuals.name: Rendering Settings
mobchampions.configuration.weaponlist.de:
Format: <rarity>-<weight>-<modid:item_name>
Rarity: 1 (Uncommon), 2 (Rare), 3 (Epic), 4 (Legendary)
Weight: Integer value representing the relative chance of selection
Example: 2-50-minecraft:diamond_sword
mobchampions.configuration.weavingeffect: Chance for the weaving effect to be applied to eligible champions.
Minimum champion rank required to apply the weaving effect.
mobchampions.configuration.windchargedef: Chance for the wind charged effect to be applied to eligible champions.
Minimum champion rank required to apply the wind charged effect.
mobchampions.lootitem.title: Mob Champion Loot
